case_title: JEFFREYS MENS SHOP VS UNITED PARCEL SERVICE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,767.44 FILED BY JEFFREYS MENS SHOP AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-09-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
